raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Joäis peehudse to
KUNGU/ un tas KUNGS pa-
klausija to/ jo wiꞥſch usluhkoja
Israëta Spaidifchanu/ ar ko tas
Sihrexi kehninsch tohs spaidtija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS dewe
Israëtam weenu Pestitaju/ ka
tee no to Sihrexi Rohkas is-
sprukke/ un tee Israëta Behrni
dshwoja faiwäs Teltis/ ta ka
pirtuak.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tatſchu tee ne atſahjehs
uo Jerobeama Namma Greh-
keem/ kas Israëlu grehkoht dar-
rijs/ bet wiꞥſch staigaja eekſch
teem : Ir tas Elka Mesch palik-
ke eekſch Samarijas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo no Joäſta Laudiin ne
bija wairak atlikkuschi/ ka veez-
defmits Jahtneeki/ un defmits
Ratti/ un defmits tuhkſtofschi
Rahjineeki. Jo tas Rehuinsch
no Sihrijas bij tohs nokawis/
un tohs darrijs ka Kuhleja Put-
tektus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Joäſta Lee-
tahm atteek/ un wiꞥſch ko wiꞥſch
irr darrijs/ un wiꞥſch winna
Spehks/ tas irr rakſtihts to
Israëta Kehniau Laiku-Grah-
matä.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Joäis atsmigge ar fa-
weem Tehweem/ un tappe eekſch
Samarijas aprakts. Un winna
Dehls Joas tappe par Kehniau
winna Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Trihsdefmits feptitä
Gaddä Joas ta Kehniau no Ju-
da/ tappe Joas Joäſta Dehls
par Kehniau pahr Israëlu eekſch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Samarijas/(un waldija) feſch-
padeſmits Gaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch darrija/ ka
tam KUNGAM ne patikke
wiꞥſch ne atſahjehs no wiſtee
Jerobeama Neebata Dehſ
Greheem/ kas Israëlu grehko-
darrijs/ eekſch teem wiꞥſch sta-
gaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas weht no Joa
Leetahm atteek/ un wiſs ko wiſsc
irr darrijs/ un wiſs wiſa
Spehks/ ka wiſch prett Amo
ziju to Kehniau no Juha farrojs
tas irr rakſtihts to Israëta Ket-
niu Laiku-Grahmata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Joas atsmigge a
taweim Tehweem/ un Jerobe-
ams fehdahs us winna Gohto
Krehflu. Bet Joas tappe eekſc
Samarijas aprakts pee teem I-
sraëta Kehnineem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Elisus bija neweffel
ar fahdu Neweffelibu/ ar ko ta-
arrt nomire/ un Joas tas Isra-
eta Kehninsch nogahjepee ta/ u-
raudaja winna Preeſcha/ u-
fazzija : Mans Tehws/ man-
Tehws! Israëta Ratti un wi-
na Jahtneeki.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Elisus fazzija ue to
Nemm weenu Stohpu/ un Bu-
tas. Un kad wiſch to Sto-
pu un Bultas pee few nehme/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija wiſch ue t
Israëta Kehniau : Uswelz t-
Stohpu ar tawu Rohku/un ta-
uswieke ar tawu Rohku. Un E-
lisus liklefawu Rohku us ta Kel-
niu Rohku/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
